summary: Factory user (kitchen role) login and Kitchen Dashboard access - WORKING. Fixed runtime error in KitchenDashboard.js caused by SelectItem empty value prop.

ui_bugs.issue: BUG FIXED: SelectItem components had value="" which throws runtime error - shadcn Select requires non-empty string values
ui_bugs.resolution: Changed value="" to value="all" with corresponding handler logic to convert back to empty string

critical_code_review_comments: Original 'Access Denied' bug was already fixed by main agent's loginJustCompleted ref in AuthContext.js
Found and fixed new bug: KitchenDashboard.js had <SelectItem value=""> which is invalid for shadcn Select component
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/KitchenDashboard.js - Fixed two SelectItem components (Outlet and Status filters) to use value="all" instead of value=""
context_for_next_testing_agent: Factory user login flow fully working. 1) Login redirects to /kitchen correctly, 2) Kitchen Dashboard renders with all features (summary cards, filters, orders table), 3) Reports page accessible for kitchen role, 4) Unauthenticated access to /kitchen redirects to /login. The original 'Access Denied' issue was caused by race condition between setUser and ProtectedRoute check - fixed by loginJustCompleted ref in AuthContext.
features_verified: Kitchen role redirect to /kitchen after login - WORKING
Kitchen Dashboard loads without 'Access Denied' message - WORKING
AuthContext sets user state correctly with loginJustCompleted ref - WORKING
ProtectedRoute allows kitchen role to access /kitchen - WORKING
Kitchen Dashboard summary cards (Total Orders, Pending Production, Ready, Picked Up, Delivered) - WORKING
Kitchen Dashboard filters (Date, Outlet, Status, Size, Flavour) - WORKING
Reports page accessible for kitchen role - WORKING
Unauthenticated access redirects to login - WORKING

original_bug.symptom: Factory user (kitchen role) seeing 'Access Denied' after login
original_bug.root_cause: Race condition in AuthContext - the useEffect for checkAuth was running before setUser completed after login, causing ProtectedRoute to check against null user
original_bug.fix_by_main_agent: Added loginJustCompleted ref in AuthContext that skips the checkAuth effect immediately after login completes

new_bug_found.symptom: Kitchen Dashboard showing 'Uncaught runtime errors' instead of rendering
new_bug_found.root_cause: SelectItem components in KitchenDashboard.js had value="" which is invalid - shadcn/radix Select requires non-empty string values for SelectItem
new_bug_found.fix: Changed value="" to value="all" and updated onChange handlers to convert 'all' back to empty string for API calls
